items.promptRawJa: Le conducteur qui a heurté les monuments ou les installations publiques peut poursuivre sa route sans s'inquiéter.
items.promptGlossEn: A driver who hits monuments or public installations can continue driving without worrying.
items.reviewerNotes: Codex medium-risk createNewQuestion: No candidate in shortlist exactly addresses 'hitting monuments or public installations' obligation to stop/report; source correct answer is 'No' (B). Create new localized question as no clear existing qid matches. Rejected top matcher: Top candidates were not about responsibility after hitting public installations; none matched semantics closely enough to reuse.
